genome_project.name: The Genome Project
genome_project.note: Wizard-token PINGS = direct damage to a player; Exsanguinate table line — board-independent but a RACE on one total

radiation_sickness.name: Radiation Sickness
radiation_sickness.note: Exsanguinate / Jarad+Lord drain / Mindcrank mill / Toxrill / Simic Asc — multiple board-independent lines

calamity_tax.name: The Calamity Tax
calamity_tax.note: Torment of Hailfire (1-card, no board) primary; Gray Merchant/Kokusho back it — deployed grind-fortress curve

dark_lords_army.name: The Dark Lord's Army
dark_lords_army.note: Gray Merchant drain + opponent-FED amass-drain (+ Cover of Darkness fear = army largely unblockable by dragons)

lightning_war.name: Lightning War
lightning_war.note: burn + copy-amplified X-spells (Comet Storm/Crackle/Banefire) = direct damage; chases a life total

zero_sum_game.name: Zero-Sum Game
zero_sum_game.note: life-loop closes on our triggers, board-independent (Summary L1: 'the kill doesn't care')

crystal_sickness.name: Crystal Sickness
crystal_sickness.note: drain + Mirrodin Besieged Phyrexian alt-win; 'win conditions (drain, mill) don't rely on creatures'

replication_crisis.name: The Replication Crisis
replication_crisis.note: combat-loop / token swarm; flying blockers wall it

lorehold_spirits.name: Lorehold Spirits
lorehold_spirits.note: spirit combat (only a niche Boros Charm burn goes over)

exiles_return.name: The Exile's Return
exiles_return.note: Summary: 'the kill requires combat'; commander damage / Kiki combat

curse_of_the_scarab.name: Curse of the Scarab
curse_of_the_scarab.note: zombie alpha strike; even the Cyc-Rift line is 'a lethal alpha strike into empty defenses' = combat

grand_design.name: The Grand Design
grand_design.note: Summary: '96% of kills are incremental COMBAT, almost no trample' -> WALLED by the flying board
